When to use:

Migrate applications to Spring Boot 4.0 and Spring Framework 7. Use when upgrading from Boot 3.5, planning a major Spring migration, adopting Jackson 3, JSpecify nullness, Jakarta EE 11 baselines, Security 7, Hibernate 7, or modular Boot starters.
